name: RBS Optimizer Pro
description: The ultimate free Windows optimization suite. Clean junk files, manage startup programs, boost performance, and monitor your system in real time — all in one polished application.

features.title: Deep Junk Cleaner
features.desc: Remove temporary files, cache, old logs, and other system clutter safely and automatically.

features.title: Startup Manager
features.desc: Control which programs launch at startup. Disable unnecessary entries to reduce boot time.

features.title: Performance Monitor
features.desc: Real-time graphs for CPU, RAM, and disk usage so you always know what's running.

features.title: One-Click Optimize
features.desc: Single button runs a full system tune-up — clean, optimize, and boost all at once.

features.title: Privacy First
features.desc: No telemetry, no data collection, no internet required. Your data stays on your machine.

features.title: Modern Interface
features.desc: Clean, dark-themed UI that is intuitive for beginners and powerful for advanced users.

notes: Junk cleaner, startup manager, performance monitor

name: RBS Voice Cloner
description: Clone any voice with just a 5-second audio sample. Powered by XTTS v2 AI engine, generate natural-sounding speech in 28+ languages — completely free, runs locally on your PC.

features.title: Voice Cloning
features.desc: Clone any voice from a 5-30 second audio sample with stunning realism using XTTS v2.

features.title: 28+ Languages
features.desc: Generate speech in English, Spanish, French, German, Hindi, Japanese, Chinese, and many more.

features.title: Text to Speech
features.desc: Convert any text to natural speech using your cloned voice profiles.

features.title: Audio Editor
features.desc: Built-in audio editor with waveform view, trim, noise reduction and pitch control.

features.title: GPU Accelerated
features.desc: Runs on your RTX GPU via CUDA for ultra-fast generation — CPU fallback for other PCs.

features.title: 100% Offline
features.desc: After the first model download, everything runs locally. No cloud, no data sent anywhere.

sysReqs: 4 GB free disk space (10 GB recommended for models)
Internet connection required for first-time model download (~2 GB)
NVIDIA GPU with CUDA recommended (CPU works but slower)

name: Life Dashboard
description: Your all-in-one personal productivity command center. 16 powerful widgets — track habits, tasks, finances, weather, sleep, diet and more — all in one beautiful dashboard.

features.title: Tasks & Habits
features.desc: To-do list with priorities and a daily habit tracker with streak counter to keep you on track.

features.title: Finance Tracker
features.desc: Log income and expenses with visual charts to understand where your money goes.

features.title: Live Weather
features.desc: Real-time weather with a 3-day forecast for any city in the world.

features.title: Goals & Countdown
features.desc: Set long-term goals with progress bars and count down to important events.

features.title: Health Tracking
features.desc: Track water intake, sleep quality, and diet plans with country-based meal templates.

features.title: 16 Widgets
features.desc: Clock, calendar, notes, Pomodoro timer, RSS news, quick links, motivational quotes and more.

sysReqs: Internet connection for weather and news widgets

notes: 16 widgets including tasks, habits, finance, weather, sleep, diet

name: RBS PC Cleaner
description: Honest Windows maintenance utility with real numbers, reversible changes, and no fake scores. Clean junk safely, manage startup, find duplicates, uninstall in bulk, apply 9 theme packs — and never touch the registry.

features.title: Safe Junk Cleaner
features.desc: Temp, recycle bin, Windows Update cache, prefetch, logs — each rated Safe / Caution / Risky, nothing deleted without confirmation.

features.title: Browser Cleaner
features.desc: Clears cache, cookies, history for Chrome, Edge, Firefox, Brave, Opera. Saved passwords are reported but never deleted.

features.title: App Cache Cleaner
features.desc: Wipes Discord, Microsoft Teams, Spotify, VS Code, Slack, Zoom cache in one click.

features.title: Disk Analyzer
features.desc: Read-only folder tree — see exactly what is using your space and drill down click by click.

features.title: Duplicate Finder
features.desc: Hash-based duplicate detection, always keeps the oldest file, auto-skips Windows and Program Files.

features.title: Bulk Uninstaller
features.desc: Tick multiple installed programs and uninstall in sequence — silent mode when supported.

features.title: Startup Manager
features.desc: Toggle any startup entry on/off. Disabled entries are parked in a sibling key — fully reversible.

features.title: Gaming Mode
features.desc: One click: safe clean + memory trim + High-Performance power plan + suspend background apps. Resume brings everything back.

features.title: 9 Theme Packs
features.desc: Real icon packs + matching 2560×1440 wallpapers + taskbar accent. Reversible with one click — Restore Original.

features.title: Scheduler
features.desc: Daily or weekly silent auto-clean via Windows Task Scheduler.

features.title: Safety Gate
features.desc: Blocks deletion inside C:\Windows, Program Files, ProgramData, drive roots — and never scans the registry.

features.title: Portable Mode
features.desc: Store settings + backups next to the exe — perfect for USB sticks and IT technicians.

sysReqs: No Python installation required — everything bundled
Administrator rights needed for drive-icon overrides, HKLM startup entries, and Windows Temp cleanup
Installer (recommended) or portable ZIP — both supported

notes: Junk, browser, and app cache cleaners with Safe/Caution/Risky ratings
Disk analyzer and hash-based duplicate finder
9 theme packs (Monochrome, Neon, Minimal, Retro, Cyberpunk, Ocean, Sunset, Forest, Windows Default)
Central safety gate — never scans or modifies the registry
